title: Software Testing
description: Core teaching around test design, coverage strategies, defect analysis, regression testing, and industrial testing workflows.

title: Mobile Application Quality Assurance
description: Practice-oriented material covering GUI exploration, scenario-based testing, cross-platform behavior, and test automation for mobile software.

title: LLMs in Software Engineering
description: Emerging content on prompt-driven engineering tasks, tool use, evaluation methods, and limitations of LLM-assisted testing.

title: Research-led Student Training
description: Students participate in reading groups, benchmark construction, replication studies, and paper-oriented project work derived from active research topics.
